stories.title: 2026 MLB All-Star predictions: Full AL, NL rosters...
stories.summary: Bryce Harper or Freddie Freeman? Ben Rice or Nick Kurtz? Here's our one-month-out look at who will make it to Philadelphia.

stories.title: Wemby condemns violence against Spurs fans
stories.summary: Victor Wembanyama was among players on both the Spurs and Knicks to condemn the videos of violence permeating social media of apparent New York fans attacking Spurs supporters.

stories.title: Rams' Jackson faces domestic violence charge
stories.summary: Rams left tackle Alaric Jackson was arrested on a felony domestic violence charge Monday night, the Los Angeles Police Department confirmed to ESPN.

stories.title: Texas court sets Sorbsy-NCAA trial for February
stories.summary: The trial for Texas Tech QB Brendan Sorsby vs. the NCAA has been set to start two weeks after the CFP National Championship is scheduled to be played.

stories.title: Serena starts comeback with doubles win at HSBC
stories.summary: After nearly four years away from professional tennis, Serena Williams won her first doubles match with partner Victoria Mboko in the opening round of the HSBC Championship.
